pluginInputs.brief: AgendiX FINANCEIRO PT-BR. MATRIZ OBRIGATÓRIA: barber-dark|barber-light|beauty-dark|beauty-light (NÃO compact/spacious). Tokens iguais login.html/dashboard.html/agenda.html. Barber accent gold: dark #C29B40, light #A07A2A — nav ativa, CTA, logo SEMPRE var(--accent) no barber light. PageHeader Financeiro + Registrar receita + filtro. KPI Receita/Despesas/Lucro. ui/Table Ultimas movimentacoes th scope, row hover. Secao Comissoes. Sidebar + bottom nav 44px. Output financeiro.html substituindo versao errada. Sentence case, no UPPERCASE, no brutal shadow.

message: Replace financeiro.html entirely. Read login.html, dashboard.html, agenda.html for correct 4-theme matrix pattern. WRONG: compact/spacious variants. MUST: barber-light with gold #A07A2A on all accent surfaces.
